Bridge

مر_ب>ם ה_{ים

Starknet

Starknet is the secure scaling technology bringing Ethereum’s benefits to the world.

Build on Starknet Bridge

Unlimited Scale

Starknet utilizes the power of STARK technology to ensure computational integrity. By validating off-chain transactions with advanced math and cryptography, Starknet overcomes Ethereum’s scalability limitations. Starknet is a Validity Rollup that provides unlimited scale while retaining Ethereum’s security and decentralization.

How Starknet Works →

Superior UX

Starknet offers efficient and user-friendly experiences by employing Native Account Abstraction. All accounts are smart accounts: their behavior is determined by their developers rather than at the protocol level. This means unparalleled flexibility in account management. Developers can customize their applications beyond protocol constraints to elevate user experience and security.

Dive Into Native AA →

Developer Hub

Starknet is home to the fastest-growing Layer 2 (L2) developer community due to its novel approach to scaling Ethereum and making it economically feasible to build even the most complex dApps. The Developer Hub provides a variety of manuals and resources for builders, by builders, on how to get started on Starknet.

Get Started with Starknet →

Creativity Unleashed

Starknet devs are empowered to code solutions that make a difference. Cairo, Starknet’s native smart contract language, allows developers to push the boundaries of their applications by allowing them to code any kind of business logic. Building with Cairo, developers can let their vision reach its full potential on Starknet.

Build With Cairo →

Cairo gets high marks from Starknet devs. Here’s why.

The developer experience on Starknet has changed significantly this past year, and here’s what developers had to say about it.

Read more

StarkWare verifies first zero-knowledge proof on Bitcoin

StarkWare successfully verifies its first zero-knowledge proof on the Bitcoin Signet network, paving the way for scalable layer-2 solutions and global payments.

Read more

Unchainedcrypto

ZK Firm StarkWare to Create $1 Million Fund for Research Into Bitcoin’s OP_CAT Proposal

Implementing OP_CAT is a preliminary step to incorporating a new layer 2 that could connect Bitcoin and Ethereum.

Read more

theblock

StarkWare announces new open source zero knowledge prover Stwo

The prover is designed to offer reduced latency and processing costs, ultimately resulting in lower blockchain transaction fees.

Read more

theblock

Starknet introduces parallel execution for transactions in latest upgrade

Starknet has introduced a mechanism called parallel execution to execute multiple transactions simultaneously on its Layer 2 chain.

Read More

The Chainlink and Pyth oracles go live on Starknet mainnet

Starknet’s integration of Chainlink and Pyth expands the real-world data available for DeFi dApps on Starknet mainnet.

Read more

The Starknet ‘Bolt’ upgrade: 2-second txs are here

Read about Starknet v0.13.2 upgrade that boosts dApps performance on Ethereum with faster transactions, parallel execution, and block packing.

Read More

    Upcoming Events

    8 - 15 September, 2024 · Kilifi, Kenya

    ETHSafari

    ETHSafari will be held in Kenya and bring together people from around the world to learn, hack, discuss, and celebrate our decentralized future.

    ETHSafari will feature an online hackathon, a bootcamp in Nairobi, alongside other side events in the city under the sun. We will have a train journey on the Standard Gauge Railway and the climax, a conference and festival on the Kenyan coast in Kilifi.

    Safari is the Swahili word for journey.

    • Africa
    • Community Event
    • Conference
    • Hackathon

    17 September, 2024 · Singapore, Singapore

    Web 3 transitions summit

    Join us in Singapore for a one-day event to learn from some of the greatest minds at the forefront of Web3 transitions

    • Asia
    • Community Event
    • Conference

    17 September, 2024 · Singapore, Singapore

    Timestamp 2024 [ABCDE & Solv]

    ​😄We’re thrilled to host Timestamp 2024 ABCDE this year in Singapore!🎉🎉

    Co-hosted by Solv Protocol & ABCDE Capital

    ​Event Supoorted by Bitlayer

    ​Shout out to Event Partners & Co-initiators: Nubit, Chainup, Sinohope, Huawei Cloud, CoreDAO

    ​Special thanks to our Community Partners: Cointime & BeWater

    ​The event is happening on September 17th, 2024, from 9am to 5pm at Fairmont Singapore (80 Bras Basah Rd, Singapore 189560). With an audience of 1000+ people, we’ll be diving into exciting topics like AI, Bitcoin (BTC), and Defi 🤖️
